title: cyperus frionensis
intro: Cyperus fritonsis, also known as the purple papyrus, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Cyperus fritonsis include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or tea, and can be used to make topical creams and salves to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
